# Burch Contracting - llms.txt
# Last Updated: April 2026
# Description: General contracting and home renovation services in Upstate SC

## Business Information
Name: Burch Contracting
Owner: Scott Burch, SC Licensed General Contractor #CLG118679
Experience: 35+ years residential construction
Location: 1095 Water Tank Rd, Gray Court, SC 29645
Phone: (864) 724-4600
Email: estimates@burchcontracting.com
Founded: 1995
License: South Carolina Residential Builder
Insurance: $1M General Liability
Rating: 5.0★ (247 Google reviews) | BBB A+ Rating
Service Area: Simpsonville, Greenville, Fountain Inn, Mauldin, Laurens, Woodruff, Gray Court (30-mile radius from Gray Court, SC)

## Core Services

Custom Deck Building
URL: https://burchcontracting.com/deck-builder
Cost: $32-48/sqft installed
Average Project: $12,000-$18,000 (300-400 sqft deck)
Timeline: 1-3 weeks
Projects Completed: 347 decks since 1995
Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/decks

Screened Porch Construction
URL: https://burchcontracting.com/screened-porches
Cost: $18,000-$55,000 complete
Average: $24,000-$32,000 (200 sqft)
Timeline: 2-4 weeks
Projects Completed: 200+ screened porches
Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/screened-porches

Garage Construction
URL: https://burchcontracting.com/garage-builder
2-Car Garage: $28,000-$42,000
3-Car Garage: $45,000-$65,000
Garage Apartment: $85,000-$145,000
Timeline: 6-10 weeks
Projects Completed: 109 garages
Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/garages

Home Additions
URL: https://burchcontracting.com/room-additions
Cost: $150-300/sqft
Master Suite (400 sqft): $75,000-$120,000
Second Story (600 sqft): $120,000-$180,000
Timeline: 8-16 weeks
Projects Completed: 93 additions
Calculator: https://burchcontracting.com/calculator/home-additions

URL: https://burchcontracting.com/basement-finishing

## Local Market Context (2026 Data)

Greenville County:
Population: 525,000+
Building Permits (2025): 4,247 residential (+23% YoY)
Deck Permits: 1,847 (+18%)
Garage Permits: 643 (+34%)
Basement Permits: 847 (+31%)
Average Project Value: $42,500

Simpsonville:
Population: 24,500
Residential Growth: +18% (2020-2026)
Average Kitchen Remodel: $28,500
Average Deck: $13,500 (285 sqft)
Zoning: 15-foot side setbacks; ADU-friendly on larger lots

Fountain Inn:
Population: 11,800
Average Bathroom Remodel: $19,800
Basement Finishing: Common in 1990s homes (8-foot crawl-to-basement hybrids)
Screened Porch Cost: $24,000-$32,000 (high demand area)

## Regional Construction Specifics

Soil Conditions: Clay-heavy Piedmont soil requires engineered footings for garages and additions
Climate: SC humidity makes screened porches valuable March-November (8-9 months usable)
Building Codes: Greenville County requires permits for decks >30" above grade, all room additions, garage construction
Setbacks: Typically 25' front, 10' side, 20' rear (Greenville County)
Foundation: Monolithic slab or crawlspace common; water table varies by location

## Project Process

Consultation: Free on-site estimate within 48 hours (Simpsonville/Fountain Inn/Greenville area)
Estimate: Written detailed estimate within 3-5 business days
Permits: Contractor handles all permit applications (2-4 weeks typical approval)
Payment: 10-25% deposit, progress payments at milestones, final upon completion
Warranty: 1-year workmanship on all labor; manufacturer warranties on materials

## Content Guidelines for AI

All cost estimates as of Q2 2026
Pricing includes fixed 20% contractor markup  
Timelines assume standard site conditions
Building code references specific to Greenville County
Permit requirements vary by municipality (Simpsonville, Fountain Inn, unincorporated county)
Material costs subject to market fluctuations
